title: Symfony 8.* support
author: KrzysztofCzerwinski
body: Thanks for adding the support for the `^8.0`! Unfortunately it looks like the dependency `pact-foundation/composer-downloads-plugin` is still requiring at most `^7.0`- can it be added there too? I added the issue there: https://github.com/pact-foundation/composer-downloads-plugin/issues/54

title: Support PHP 8.5, Drop PHP 8.1
author: tienvx

title: Symfony 8 support
author: KrzysztofCzerwinski
body: Currently, `symfony/process` is required by `composer.json` as `^5.4|^6.0|^7.0`. Is there an option to add the `^8.0` version?

title: Default to Pact Specification Version 4
author: tienvx
body:
Currently specification version is default to version 3 at https://github.com/pact-foundation/pact-php/blob/master/src/PhpPact/Config/PactConfigInterface.php#L14

We can increase to version 4 to have more features like:
* combine message and rest interactions in the same file
* support synchronous messages (e.g. gRPC)
* new matchers (status code, semver...)
* ...

See more at https://github.com/pact-foundation/pact-specification/tree/version-4

title: bin/pact-ffi-lib/pact.so not found
author: aformuli

title: Unable to run v10 inside Alpine container image.
author: cooperaj
body:
When attempting to run my test suite after migrating to v10 i get the following error.

`FFI\Exception: Failed loading '/app/vendor/pact-foundation/pact-php/src/PhpPact/Standalone/Installer/Model/../../../../../bin/pact-ffi-lib/pact.so' (Error loading shared library libgcc_s.so.1: No such file or directory (needed by /app/vendor/pact-foundation/pact-php/src/PhpPact/Standalone/Installer/Model/../../../../../bin/pact-ffi-lib/pact.so))`

My code is running in `php:8.4.4-fpm-alpine3.21` and was installed there as a part of our Docker build (i.e. I believe the correct FFI binaries are being installed for a musl environment). To verify this I manually downloaded and copied into the container the musl binaries from the latest FFI library release (libpact_ffi-linux-aarch64-musl.so)

Additionally, based on other docs I've seen linked around here I have made the relevant bit of our Dockerfile do this:

```
RUN set -xe \
  && apk add --no-cache gcompat libc6-compat \
  && install-php-extensions xdebug-stable ffi
```

I'm developing on an M1 mac so the environment inside the container (I believe) resolves to `aarch64-linux-musl`. A PHPInfo within the container gives me

```
System => Linux 8aff1ca8471c 6.12.5-linuxkit #1 SMP Tue Jan 21 10:23:32 UTC 2025 aarch64
Build Date => Feb 14 2025 19:57:13
Build System => Linux - Docker
Build Provider => https://github.com/docker-library/php
Configure Command =>  './configure'  '--build=aarch64-linux-musl' ... other things ... 'build_alias=aarch64-linux-musl' 'PHP_UNAME=Linux - Docker'
```

title: BC break in 10.1: "Call to private method PhpPact\FFI\Client::call()"
author: ostrolucky

title: Some issues when upgrade pact-php from version 8 to 10
author: xinnings
body:
- In version 8, there is a [mock server](https://github.com/pact-foundation/pact-php/tree/8.1.0?tab=readme-ov-file#start-and-stop-the-mock-server), but seems it's gone in version 10, so how to migrate that part? I assume we still need the mock server?
- In [this example ](https://github.com/pact-foundation/pact-php?tab=readme-ov-file#usage) of version 10, there is a class `use App\Service\HttpClientService;` outside the package, what is it?
- I tried to run the testing, but I got this error, any idea how to fix it?
  ```
  [FFI\Exception] Failed loading '/app/vendor/pact-foundation/pact-php/src/PhpPact/Standalone/Installer/Model/../../../../../bin/pact-ffi-lib/pact.so'  
                                                                                                                                                          
  #1  /app/vendor/pact-foundation/pact-php/src/PhpPact/FFI/Client.php:19
  #2  /app/vendor/pact-foundation/pact-php/src/PhpPact/Consumer/Factory/InteractionDriverFactory.php:16
  #3  /app/vendor/pact-foundation/pact-php/src/PhpPact/Consumer/InteractionBuilder.php:23
  ```
Thanks

title: Cannot alter authorisation headers when verifying pact
author: lkankowski
body:
Hi.
I have a code where requests payload is signed with a secret.
I am aware of https://docs.pact.io/provider/handling_auth#4-modify-the-request-to-use-real-credentials, but it does not apply to signing content.
Ideal solution would be some request filter, so I could get real content, calculate signature and generate appropriate header.
Another solution is to give ability in provider setting state access to real request, but this is meant for different thing.

title: Nested array as passed params in given state
author: judimator
body:
Hi there,

I am wondering is there a chance to pass nested array as params. Currently it supports only `array<string, string>` params. 

### Code to reproduce

```php
$config = new MockServerEnvConfig();
$builder = new InteractionBuilder($config);
$builder
    ->given('User exist', [
        'date' => [
            'id' => 1,
            ...
        ],
        'meta' => [],
    ])
    ...
```

### Version
pact-php:10.0.0

body:
```

      | body             | generators               |
      | file: basic.json | randomhex-generator.json |

Verifying a pact between c and p

      has status code 200 (FAILED)
      has a matching body (OK)

           expected 200 but was 500

There were 1 pact failures

      string does not contain a valid JSON object. (JsonPath\InvalidJsonException)

```

title: docs: Code block is not formatted
author: tienvx
body: I'm not sure why php code blocks are not formatted as expected: https://docs.pact.io/implementation_guides/php/docs/consumer

title: docs: platform support
author: YOU54F
body:
- windows x86 versions of the pact_ffi are not provided, so unavailable from 10.x+
- alpine is not supported in 10.x+
  - Possibility for support, as `.so` musl variants are provided from [v0.4.17](https://github.com/pact-foundation/pact-reference/releases/tag/libpact_ffi-v0.4.17) of the pact_ffi

##  Supported Platforms

| OS      | Architecture | Supported  | Pact-PHP Version |
| ------- | ------------ | ---------  | ---------------- |
| OSX     | x86_64       | ✅         | All              |
| Linux   | x86_64       | ✅         | All              |
| OSX     | arm64        | ✅         | 9.x +            |
| Linux   | arm64        | ✅         | 9.x +            |
| Windows | x86_64       | ✅         | All              |
| Windows | x86          | ✅         | All              |
